pages.name: Home
pages.description: Main entry point with overview of the church and quick access to key tasks.
primary_functions: Provide clear navigation to Plan a Visit, Sermons, Events, Serve, Give, and Care sections
Highlight upcoming services and key events with links to relevant detail pages
Offer quick-action tiles for planning a visit, room reservations, and requesting care

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Plan a Visit" hero button or quick-action tile
Click an upcoming service card in the homepage highlights
Click "View all events" link under featured events
Click a featured event card
Click a "Reserve a Room" quick-action tile
Click a "Need Care?" quick-action tile

access_methods.description: Accessed via main logo or Home link in header navigation
Primary landing page from external URLs

pages.name: Plan a Visit & Services
pages.description: Central page to plan an in-person visit and explore worship service options.
primary_functions: Display a list of upcoming worship services with basic details (day, time, location, childrens programs)
Provide filters for day of week, time range, service style, and childrens programming (e.g., ages 510)
Allow users to select a service card to view full details on the Service Details page

incoming_params.description: Optional default day-of-week filter (e.g., 'sunday') applied on initial load.
Optional earliest service start time filter in HH:MM (e.g., '09:00').
Optional latest service start time filter in HH:MM (e.g., '11:00').
Optional default service style filter (e.g., 'contemporary').
Optional flag ('true'/'false') to pre-filter services that have any children's programming.
Optional minimum child age to pre-filter services with matching children's programs.
Optional maximum child age to pre-filter services with matching children's programs.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a worship service card in the filtered results

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Plan a Visit" header navigation item
Linked from homepage quick actions and Contact & Directions page
Pre-filtering based on URL parameters for day, time range, and children's ages

pages.name: Service Details
pages.description: Detailed information about a specific worship service, with visit planning tools.
primary_functions: Show full service details including date, start/end time, location, teaching pastor, and available childrens programs by age group
Allow users to click an Add to Visit Plan button to mark this service as part of their planned visit
Allow users to select a childrens program age group (e.g., ages 510) and add it to their visit plan via an Add Childrens Program action
Summarize the current visit plan (selected service and childrens program) in a small on-page panel

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the worship service to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to all services" link

access_methods.description: Accessed when a serviceId is provided in the URL
Reached from service cards on Home or Plan a Visit pages

pages.name: Events & Calendar
pages.description: Browse and filter all church events, including classes, workshops, and community events.
primary_functions: Display events in list, month, and week views with a toggle (e.g., view=week for MondaySunday weekly calendar)
Provide filters for category (e.g., classes & workshops, community), date range (including current month), day of week (MonSun), time range, and price (including free events)
Allow sorting by options such as Date  Earliest First and other relevant sorts
Enable users to click an event card to open the Event Detail & Registration page
Support adding events directly to the personal events list via quick Save/Add to My Events buttons when appropriate

incoming_params.description: Initial view type for the calendar: 'calendar', 'list', or 'week'.
Optional event category filter (e.g., 'classes_workshops', 'community').
Start date (ISO date) for initial date range filter.
End date (ISO date) for initial date range filter.
Comma-separated list of days of week to filter (e.g., 'monday,tuesday,friday').
Optional earliest event start time filter in HH:MM (e.g., '17:00').
Optional latest event start time filter in HH:MM.
Price filter value such as 'any', 'free_only', or 'paid_only'.
Sort key such as 'date_earliest', 'date_latest', or 'name_az'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event card in any events view
Click "My Events" shortcut within the events page

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Events" header navigation item (events.html?view=calendar)
Linked from homepage featured events and ministry pages
View mode and filters can be set via URL parameters

pages.name: Event Detail & Registration
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific event, with registration and save options.
primary_functions: Show full event details including description, date, start/end time, location, capacity, and price (including indication of free / $0 events)
Provide a Register or Sign Up form allowing users to enter name, email, number of attendees, and submit registration
Offer an Add to My Events or Save button to add the event to the personal events list
Confirm successful registration or saving with an inline confirmation message

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the event whose details and registration form are shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View My Events" after a successful registration or save
Click "Back to Events" link

access_methods.description: Accessed with an eventId parameter in the URL
Reached from event cards on Home, Events, or My Events pages

pages.name: My Events / Saved Events
pages.description: Personal list of saved and registered events for the current user.
primary_functions: Display a list of events the user has saved or registered for, including date, time, and category
Allow users to click any listed event to return to the Event Detail & Registration page
Allow removal of events from the personal list via a Remove or Unsave action

incoming_params.description: Optional event ID to highlight or scroll into view after completing a registration.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event in the My Events list
Click "Find more events" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "My Events" header navigation item
Linked from Event Detail confirmation messages

pages.name: Room Reservations Search
pages.description: Interface to search for and select church rooms for meetings and gatherings.
primary_functions: Provide selectors for date (calendar picker), time range (start/end times), and expected group size or required capacity
Search and display available rooms matching date, time, and capacity requirements (e.g., suitable for 812 people)
Show basic room details (name, capacity range, location, amenities) in the results list
Allow users to click a Request This Room button on a room card to proceed to the Room Reservation Request page with selected date/time pre-filled

incoming_params.description: Default date (ISO date) selection for the room search.
Default start time in HH:MM for the requested room.
Default end time in HH:MM for the requested room.
Default expected attendee count used for capacity filtering.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Request This Room" on a search result card

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Room Reservations" footer link
Linked from homepage quick actions and Contact & Directions page
Pre-populate search criteria (date, time, attendees) via URL parameters

pages.name: Room Reservation Request
pages.description: Form to request a specific room at the chosen date and time.
primary_functions: Display a summary of the selected room, date, and time slot (e.g., next Wednesday 7:009:00pm) from the previous search
Allow users to confirm or adjust the date and time slot within allowed constraints
Provide fields for group name, contact person, email address, expected number of attendees, and any notes or purpose of use
Submit the reservation request via a Submit Reservation Request button and show a confirmation message

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the room being requested.
Requested reservation date (ISO date).
Requested start time (HH:MM).
Requested end time (HH:MM).
Expected attendee count for the reservation.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Change room or time" link to adjust search

access_methods.description: Accessed after selecting a room, via roomId and time context parameters
Reservation form submits via submitRoomReservationRequest interface

pages.name: Sermons
pages.description: Library of recorded sermons/messages with search, filters, and watch-later capability.
primary_functions: Provide a search bar for keyword queries (e.g., forgiveness) across sermon titles, descriptions, and tags
Offer filters for date range (including Last 6 Months), topics/tags (e.g., Forgiveness), speaker, and series
Allow sorting by Date  Newest First and other sort orders
Display sermon cards with title, date, speaker, topic tags, and quick actions
Support adding sermons to a Watch Later playlist via an Add to Watch Later button on each sermon card
Allow users to click a sermon card to open a full sermon view (if implemented) or begin playback

incoming_params.description: Initial search query text (e.g., 'forgiveness').
Optional topic/tag filter (e.g., 'forgiveness').
Preset date range key such as 'last_6_months'.
Custom start date (ISO date) for sermon filter.
Custom end date (ISO date) for sermon filter.
Optional speaker name filter.
Optional sermon series title filter.
Sort key such as 'date_newest' or 'date_oldest'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Watch Later" header link or playlist shortcut while browsing sermons

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Sermons" header navigation item
Linked from Home and Ministries pages
Search query and filters may be encoded in URL parameters

pages.name: Watch Later Playlist
pages.description: Users personalized watch-later playlist of saved sermons.
primary_functions: Display all sermons the user has added to their Watch Later list, in the order saved or with optional sorting
Allow users to start playing any sermon directly from the playlist
Provide options to remove sermons from the playlist
Confirm that sermons added from the Sermons page (e.g., three recent forgiveness sermons) appear in this list

incoming_params.description: Optional sermon ID to scroll to or emphasize after adding to Watch Later.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Sermons" link from the playlist view

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Watch Later" header navigation item
Linked from confirmations when adding sermons to Watch Later

pages.name: Volunteer Opportunities
pages.description: Listing of volunteer roles with filters for schedule and time commitment.
primary_functions: Display volunteer roles with key attributes: ministry area, day(s) needed, time window, and hours per week
Provide filters for day of week (e.g., Saturday), time commitment (e.g., under 3 hours per week), and category (e.g., Guest Services)
Offer sorting options such as Name  A to Z or Recommended
Allow users to click a role title to open the Volunteer Role Detail page

incoming_params.description: Default day-of-week filter for roles (e.g., 'saturday').
Time commitment filter value (e.g., 'under_3_hours').
Volunteer role category filter (e.g., 'guest_services').
Sort key such as 'name_az' or 'recommended'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a volunteer role title

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Serve" header navigation item
Accessed via the "Volunteer" footer link
Linked from Ministries and Home pages
Pre-filter roles based on day, category, or time commitment via URL

pages.name: Volunteer Role Detail
pages.description: Detailed description of a single volunteer opportunity, with an interest form.
primary_functions: Show full details about the role: responsibilities, schedule, required skills, time commitment, and ministry contact
Provide a Sign Up or Im Interested button that reveals or scrolls to an interest form
Allow users to submit an interest form with name, email, preferred day (e.g., Saturday), and preferred time window (e.g., 8:0010:00am)
Confirm successful interest submission with on-page feedback

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the volunteer role whose details are displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Volunteer Opportunities" link

access_methods.description: Accessed when a volunteerRoleId is provided in the URL
Reached from the Volunteer Opportunities listing
Interest form submission handled via submitVolunteerInterest

pages.name: Online Giving & Pledges
pages.description: Central page for online giving and pledges to various church funds.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose between giving types such as immediate donations and Pledge Only / commitment with no payment processed
Provide an amount input field for entering pledge amounts (e.g., $25)
Offer a fund/designation dropdown including options like Youth Ministry and other ministry funds
Provide frequency options including One-Time for pledge frequency
Collect donor information such as name and email address
Submit a pledge or giving commitment via a Submit Pledge or Confirm Commitment button and display confirmation

incoming_params.description: Fund identifier to preselect in the fund/designation dropdown (e.g., Youth Ministry fund).
Initial giving type value such as 'pledge_only' or 'immediate_donation'.
Optional default amount to prefill in the pledge amount field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Learn about our ministries" link from the giving page

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Give" header navigation item
Accessed via the "Online Giving" footer link
Linked from Ministries page for ministry-specific giving
Fund and default amount can be passed via URL parameters

pages.name: Care & Counseling Overview
pages.description: Overview of pastoral care and counseling services, with access to pastor profiles.
primary_functions: Describe available care and counseling services (e.g., marriage counseling, grief support, prayer requests)
List counselors and pastors with brief profile snippets and key specialties (e.g., marriage counseling, marriage and family)
Provide filters or tags to quickly identify pastors by specialty (e.g., marriage, family, youth)
Allow users to click a pastors name or card to open the Pastor Profile & Counseling Request page

incoming_params.description: Optional specialty filter (e.g., 'marriage_counseling') to highlight relevant pastors.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a pastor's card or "Request with this pastor" button

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Care & Counseling" header navigation item
Accessed via the "Pastoral Counseling" footer link
Linked from Home and Contact pages for those seeking care
Specialty filter may be set via URL to jump directly to a type of care

pages.name: Pastor Profile & Counseling Request
pages.description: Detailed profile of a specific pastor, including counseling specialties and appointment request form.
primary_functions: Display full pastor bio, photo, and list of counseling specialties (e.g., marriage counseling, marriage and family)
Provide a Request Counseling Appointment button that reveals or scrolls to a scheduling interface
Allow users to select a date within the next calendar week and choose an available morning time slot (e.g., 9:00am12:00pm)
Provide an appointment request form collecting name, email, reason for visit (e.g., Marriage Counseling), and any brief notes
Submit the appointment request and show confirmation that it has been received

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the pastor whose profile and availability are displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Care & Counseling" link

access_methods.description: Accessed when a pastorId is provided in the URL
Reached from Care & Counseling overview and leader lists on About page
Appointment request form submitted via submitCounselingAppointmentRequest

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the churchs mission, beliefs, and leadership.
primary_functions: Present the churchs mission, vision, and core beliefs
Introduce key leaders or staff with brief bios and photos
Provide links to related pages such as Ministries, Care, and Contact

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Explore our ministries" link from the About page
Click a "Pastoral care" or similar link
Click on a leader whose profile is linked to a pastor record

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "About" footer link
May be linked directly from external sites and materials

pages.name: Contact & Directions
pages.description: Contact information and directions to the church campus.
primary_functions: Display the church address, service times summary, phone number, and key email contacts
Embed or link to a map with directions and parking information
Provide a simple contact form for general inquiries
Offer links to Plan a Visit and Room Reservations for action-oriented follow-up

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Plan a Visit" from the Contact page
Click "Reserve a Room" from the Contact page
Click "Request Pastoral Care" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Contact & Directions" footer link
Frequently used landing page for map links and printed directions
General inquiry form submits via submitContactForm

pages.name: Ministries Overview
pages.description: Overview of major church ministries and programs.
primary_functions: List key ministries (e.g., Youth Ministry, Childrens Ministry, Small Groups, Outreach) with brief descriptions
Highlight connections to other site sections, such as Youth Ministry linking to giving designations and events
Provide contact information or next steps for getting involved in specific ministries

incoming_params.description: Optional ministry identifier to scroll to and emphasize.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Give to this ministry" on a ministry card
Click "Serve with this ministry" on a ministry card
Click "View ministry events"

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Ministries" footer link
Linked from About and Give pages
URL may specify a ministry to highlight via highlightMinistryId

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and quick access to main sections
Plan a Sunday or weekday visit and view service times
Browse and search recorded sermons and messages
View church events and calendar in list or calendar views
Explore volunteer opportunities and sign up to serve
Online giving and pledges to church funds
Pastoral care, counseling information, and counseling team
View and manage saved and registered events
View and manage your watch-later sermon playlist

footer_links.description: Learn more about the churchs mission, beliefs, and leadership
Contact information, address, and directions to the church
Overview of church ministries and programs
Request use of church rooms and facilities
Information about counseling services and how to request an appointment
Make a donation or pledge to church funds
Find ways to serve and submit interest in volunteer roles
Search and watch sermons from recent services
